reviews.review_msg: Great TA, better understanding of the course material than the prof. Tutorials really helped and the content was interesting. Beau tries his best to explain the content in an accessible way. He was always approachable and kind overall. Really cares about what he teaches
Love beau, super nice, super caring, super engaging.

i have had beau as a TA for two classes (COGS100 and PSYC352) and he has just been the best for both. very easy to contact and gives in depth feedback on all assignments. it's really hard to find TAs who aren't praying on my downfall at SFU, but beau has always been very caring and supportive of his students!
